events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary singer-songwriter and former Beatle, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Magic
angles.copy: Happy 84th to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! His influence on music is simply immeasurable.

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: British singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Voice of the 80s
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! That voice is still pure magic.

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and record producer Lionel Richie, known for his smooth ballads and funk-infused hits, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? It is! Happy 77th birthday to the legendary Lionel Richie!

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy, Emmy, and Tony Award-winning American singer Cyndi Lauper, known for her distinctive style and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the absolute icon, Cyndi Lauper! Still shining bright and bringing all the fun.

events.title: Remembering George Michael, would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering British music icon George Michael, who would have been 63 today.

angles.name: Forever Missed
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. His music lives on.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who died on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's music and artistry continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! Sending him peace and love today.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the incredible Brian May! His guitar solos are truly out of this world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy, the moves, the legend! Happy Birthday!

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video, changing the music landscape forever.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV burst onto our screens with the iconic 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: 32 years of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Mad for it!
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. A truly legendary festival.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His legacy continues to shake up the world.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who died on September 13, 1996, after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the music world lost a true visionary. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after we lost one of the greatest guitarists of all time.

events.title: 57 years of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Walk the Line
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer-songwriter Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and force of nature.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Liam Gallagher, former frontman of Oasis and Beady Eye, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: As You Were
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll attitude.

events.title: 51 years of John Lennon's 'Imagine' (UK single)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years ago, John Lennon's powerful message of 'Imagine' was released in the UK. A song that still resonates globally.

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod was announced
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple unveiled the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent and the enduring film franchise.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film, song, or gadget? Licence to thrill all day long.
